intro: # Intro is the begining sequence, starting the intro starts the game
Harpagon the great makes the universe.
Implementing physics, chemistry, and adding a few... author's notes... for people to stumble opon.

?
Do you wish to be from [dark_cyan]New Floridia[/dark_cyan], [orange_red1]Kazakhstan[/orange_red1] or [cyan2]Latveria[/cyan2]?
kazakhstan_intro: The dark, beautiful crimson of Kazakhstani sky, once called New Romania, lights up the windows of the store.
A thriving civilization, Kazakhstan is the world's largest producer of neotatos, a genetically modified, hyper-resistant viral strain of, now extinct, primitive potatoes.
floridia_intro: You look up as the dank, musky humidity of the New Floridian air hits your lungs.
Hailing from Yung Jacksonvile (once called old then new, now Yung) you, having festered for decades in swamps, are a resiliant and formidable opponent.
latveria_intro: The unforgetable sting of the cold Latverian tundra hits your sinuses as you look at the blindingly white horizon.
As a scientist from the world's technological capital, you have access to the newest and most efficient transport.

kazakhstan_store_earth.title: Kazakhstan's best Wares
kazakhstan_store_earth.store_keeper_msg: Welcome farmer! I'll give you a discount on food!

floridia_store_earth.title: Gator's General Store
floridia_store_earth.store_keeper_msg: Ey there Par'ner! I will give you a discount on arms!

latveria_store_earth.title: Latverian Good's
latveria_store_earth.store_keeper_name: John Jon Jhon Ion Lohn Long John
latveria_store_earth.store_keeper_msg: Welcome Fellow Latverians! I'll give you a discount on parts!

items.name: High Quality Latvian Bolts and Nuts

kazakhstan_store_moon.title: Kazakhstan's best Wares
kazakhstan_store_moon.store_keeper_msg: Welcome farmer! I'll give you a discount on food!

floridia_store_moon.title: Gator's General Store
floridia_store_moon.store_keeper_msg: Ey there Par'ner! I will give you a discount on arms!

latveria_store_moon.title: Latverian Good's
latveria_store_moon.store_keeper_name: John Jon Jhon Ion Lohn Long John's Moon Cousin
latveria_store_moon.store_keeper_msg: Welcome Fellow Latverians! I'll give you a discount on parts!

items.name: High Quality Latvian Bolts and Nuts

earth_moon_junction: You start your journey to the [bold]moon[/bold]!
engine_failure: Unfortunately, freezing cold temperatures zapped your engine, causing a critical failure in your transport.
You do not have enough parts to repair the ship, this is the end of your journey.
Unfortunately, you had to spend [bold]X1 SPARE PART[/bold] but you are back on track to the moon!
space_crate: Lucky you, you get [bold]1x SPARE PARTS[/bold], [bold]5x FOOD[/bold], [bold][cyan1]2500S¥[/cyan1][/bold], and [bold]1x ARMS[/bold]!
friendly_fiend: !slow 6 Brr.. Brrr... your comms ring... brrr... brrr...
You fly over and find two people asking for help, they need [bold]3X FOOD[/bold].
friendly_fiend_yes: Distressed space man: Thank you so much! Have this, it is the least I could do.
friendly_fiend_no: The distressed space man's face grows red with anger as he pulls his arm from his jacket and destroys your ship.
You do not have enough parts to repair your ship so you are left stranded on an asteroid. You may not make it back to Earth.
You narrowly escape the distressed space man's attacks, but you have to use [bold]2X SPARE PARTS[/bold] to repair your ship.
moon: You made it to the moon!
You jump around for a little bit before heading to the shops for supplies.
phobos_deimos_pirates: On your travel, you encounter the infamous Phobos Deimos Pirates, unsurprisingly named after the activities they regularly perform.
Through the comms, you hear violent rambles about how it would [be in your best interest to drop off all your items]. How cliché. Now, how will you proceed?
You successfully defeat them, gaining [bold]2X SPARE PARTS, 2X FOOD[/bold], [bold][cyan1]5000S¥[/cyan1][/bold] in exchange of using up [bold]5X ARMS[/bold]
After your encounter with these hooligans, you continue your journey to Mars, successfully evading any more danger as you land in Mars.
You barely avoid death, though your spaceship was unfortunately damaged in the process of it. You use up [bold][red]3X SPARE PARTS[/red][/bold]to repair the ship.
mars: It used to be beautiful after a few teraforming operations in the '50s but now it is just littered with rovers.
Some are still collecting data to this day.
friendly_ships: As you cross the asteroid belt you come accross some friendly ships.
The leaders of the ships offer free supplies to help you on your journey.
?Do you accept their offers or rob them of all they have?
friendly_ships_accept: You recive [bold]3X FOOD[/bold], [bold]3X SPARE PARTS[/bold] and [bold]1X ARMS[/bold].
friendly_ships_rob: You betray the trust of your fellow travellers and recive [bold]3X FOOD[/bold], [bold]3X SPARE PARTS[/bold] and [bold]1X ARMS[/bold].
You, being the master criminal you are, also steal [bold][cyan1]5S¥[/cyan1][/bold].
collision: While carefully maneuvering the asteroid cloud, avoiding wasting too many Parsecs moving around, you hit an asteroid.
You do not have enough spare parts to repair your ship. This is the end of your journey.
You have enough spare parts to repair the damage and fix your ship!
food_shortage: You prioritized the lives of your crewmates and minimizing hull damage too much! Food is being wasted the longer you travel.
You run out of food. The end.
You have enough to go on the last leg of your jouney!
europa: Due to the weather being a little too intense in the only hot spot on Jupiter, the Great Red Spot, you instead maneuver your way to one of its moons, Europa.
Though an extremely icy moon, it holsters a great population of scientists performing research on extraterrestrial life. Out of these scientists, one presents themselves before you.

Hello there, the name is Bill Nye! Some people refer to me as THE Science Guy, though that was ages ago. As I assume, you folks are making your way to Saturn, are you now? I have always had a keen interest in its rings, as they certainly are way more observable than Jupiter's! If you want to, I will provide you with my special arm and goods, obviously at a price!

bill_nye_store_europa.title: Science Guy's Speciality Space Shop
bill_nye_store_europa.store_keeper_msg: Did you know that underneath the icy surface of Europa, lies a salty liquid ocean?

saturn_war: Incredibly close to Saturn, you encounter a major army of competitor ships, all aiming to be the first to land on Saturn. Desperate for this once in a lifetime opportunity, you are left with no choice but to...
You lose the battle, watching those filthy enemies reach your only life goal, as you slowly lose sight of it as you die of blood loss.
You successfully survive this all-out war, achieving the feat of being the first human to land on Saturn.
saturn: You successfully made it to Saturn!
